title: Fantastic Worlds (WorldGeneration)
description: A mod all about tweaking your World-Generation. Adjusted Generation-Parameters for rougher Terrain.
body:
# Fantastic Worlds
A mod all about tweaking your World-Generation. Adjusted Generation-Parameters for rougher Terrain.

![Rougher and Higher Mountains for the little Extra and a more interesting exploration. A Forest in the front and higher frozen mountains in the back.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44266def7828ecb5740b73c62c0fe905e706d4e5_0.webp)
# Features

- New Build-Height: 512 (before 320)
- New World-Depth: -128 (before -64)
- Lava-Level: -114 (before -54)
- Rougher Terrain and higher Mountains - even reaching beyond a height of 320 Blocks!
- Adds an own Custom-World-Preset (1.2.0 and beyond)

This mod replaces Minecraft’s default world generation. Simply create a new world and start exploring!

![More dynamic Worlds. A very rough Desert with several Dunes, swinging up and down, as well as even more rough Badlands in the far distance.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a199be4cb17cbc3e974a6513fee16d808bd2847_0.webp)
# General Information

This mod currently supports Fabric and Forge in 1.20 to 1.20.4, as well as 1.21 and beyond.

Ensure you’re using the appropriate version of the API.
